channel.title: Career on AI Blog Factory
channel.description: Recent content in Career on AI Blog Factory

item.title: How to Build an AI-Powered Project for Your Portfolio in 2026 (Step-by-Step)
item.description: Learn how to build an impressive AI-powered project for your student portfolio using free tools. No experience needed — complete walkthrough with code examples.

item.title: How to Start Freelancing with AI Skills as a Student in 2026 (Complete Guide)
item.description: Learn how to start freelancing with AI skills as a student in 2026. Find clients, set rates, and earn your first $500 using AI tools — no experience needed.

item.title: How to Use ChatGPT to Write a Resume That Gets Interviews in 2026
item.description: Learn how to use ChatGPT to craft a professional resume that passes ATS systems and lands interviews. Step-by-step prompts and templates included.

item.title: How to Make Money with AI as a Student in 2026 (10 Proven Ways)
item.description: Discover 10 proven ways to make money with AI as a student in 2026. From freelance writing to AI art, start earning with these practical AI side hustles.

item.title: How to Start a Side Hustle with No-Code AI Tools in 2026 (Step-by-Step)
item.description: Learn how to launch a profitable side hustle with no-code AI tools in 2026. No coding required — just smart tools and hustle. Full guide inside.

item.title: How to Use AI to Land Your Internship in 2026 (Complete Strategy Guide)
item.description: Learn how to use AI to land internship offers in 2026. Step-by-step strategy covering resumes, cover letters, interviews, LinkedIn, and a 30-day action plan.
